# Missing Data

::: {.callout-note}
## Drafting note
Chapter content in progress. Migrate the corresponding text here; use `$...$` / `$$...$$` for math, place figures in `images/`, and use ```{r} or ```{python} code blocks.
:::

## Mechanisms of missingness

_To be added._

## Traditional methods for missing data

_To be added._

## Adherence

_To be added._

## Survivor bias and treatment time zero

_To be added._
